resources.string: To add local models, first download them to your desktop, then run \'%1$s\'. After that, the models will appear in the model list.
Already set as default ASR model
This model is already set as default
This model is already set as default TTS
API configuration has been reset, service restarted
API configuration has been reset to default values
Apk download started, view progress in the notification
Audio Output is very slow for now, Would you like to continue anyway?
Test %1$d/%2$d (PP=%3$d, TG=%4$d)\nRuntime: %5$.3fs, Prefill: %6$.3fs, Decode: %7$.3fs\nPrefill Speed: %8$.2f t/s, Decode Speed: %9$.2f t/s
Are you sure you want to stop the benchmark test?
Camera permission is required to take photos
Camera access is needed to take photos for your chat
Cannot Create New Session when generating
Cannot start voice chat when generating
Cannot uncheck default model. Please select another model first.
Are you sure you want to close debug mode? This will hide the debug mode option from settings until you activate it again by clicking the version info 5 times.
Configuration restored to default, processing service status...
Are you sure you want to delete this model? This action cannot be undone.
To improve stability, we only collect necessary diagnostics data. Confirm turning this off?
Only necessary crash and diagnostics data is collected to improve stability.
Debug and test various app functionalities
debug message copied, please report issue in github
Debug mode has been closed. It will be hidden from settings.
Configure debug mode settings and preferences
This will crash the app immediately for Crashlytics verification. Continue?
Are you sure you want to delete this chat history? This action cannot be undone.
Sorry, diffusion model settings are not supported config here yet.
Image generation takes about 1 minute. Please wait patiently...\nProgress: %1$s%%
Image generation takes about 1 minute. Please wait patiently...
Start OpenAI-compatible API server for external access
Failed to show voice model market: %1$s
The model \"%1$s\" is %2$sB in size, which is quite large and may cause the app to crash due to memory limitations. Do you want to continue opening this model?
Is there anything I can help you with?
Please input prompt\nI can generate an image for you
Please upload a face image to convert to anime
Model not downloaded, cannot set as default
No camera app found on this device
Try adjusting your filters to see more models, or clear all filters to see all available models.
No history, please select model in the model list and chat
No models available. Please download a model first.
OpenCL backend support for the current model is still in progress. Please wait until support is completed.
Please grant permission to install apps.
Please wait for current generation to complete before switching models
I understand and agree to crash data collection for stability improvements
Crash reporting disabled. No crash data will be uploaded.
Crash reporting enabled. Only crash/diagnostic data will be collected.

To improve app stability, MNN Chat can collect crash and diagnostic data through Firebase Crashlytics.

We only use this data to locate and fix crashes, improve reliability, and accelerate iteration.

You can choose whether to enable this collection:
• Agree: allow crash and diagnostic reporting
• Disagree: no crash data is uploaded

Your choice will not affect core app usage.
You have chosen not to agree to the Privacy Policy. The application will now exit.
You must agree to the Privacy Policy to use this application
QNN model detected but device does not support QNN acceleration. Please use a different model.
This QNN model requires additional libraries. Download now?
Please allow permission to record audio
Release to Send, Slide up to cancel
Are you sure to report an issue on GitHub?
Request added to queue: requestId=%1$s, traceId=%2$s, queue size=%3$d, priority=%4$s
Are you sure you want to reset API configuration? This will restore all API settings to default values.
Reset API server settings to default values
Restarting API service to apply new configuration...
Start benchmark after selected your model
If this persists, verify API Service is on and notifications are allowed.
API service is disabled. Turn on API Service in Settings.
it\'s recommended to remove unfinished tasks and redownload to prevent errors.
Star us on Github to show your support!
Stop downloads during chat ensures smoother chat experience
This will remove all cache that is not linked to any downloaded model. This action cannot be undone.
Test logs added with line number info
Test log added\nLong press log entries to try jumping to code
This is a test log to verify line number display and click navigation
Debug info: Line number feature test
Warning: Please ensure Android Studio has the project open
Enter text to convert to speech...
Select a video file to decode
What can I help you with?
To use voice chat, please select and download TTS and ASR models first. Switch between the tabs above to set up both types of models.
To use voice chat, TTS and ASR models need to be downloaded. Please note multi-language support.
Manage TTS and ASR models, set default models
Voice models download complete! Starting voice chat...
Voice chat requires %1$d additional models. Starting download...
Voice models: %1$d/%2$d ready. Downloading remaining models...
please wait for download complete and install
